params.name: Roslin Certificate
params.description:
On Jan 7, 1993 AD, the Roslin Institute was officially established in Edinburgh, Scotland.
This graduation certificate is from the world-renowned Roslin Institute, famous for the birth of the world's first cloned sheep. The institute has been dedicated to research in animal genetics and reproductive biology, with its contributions holding significant implications for improving human life. This certificate symbolizes their recognition and a proof of professionalism.
